name: Ottawa Bus Svc Inc
registry_source: Kansas Secretary of State Business Entity Search (sos.ks.gov) - direct lookup blocked (HTTP 403); inc_date not confirmed via SoS
notes: Legal name OTTAWA BUS SERVICE INC; DBA Crossroad Tours. Address matches input exactly (1320 W 149th St, Olathe, KS). Safety rating Satisfactory as of 10/07/2024. FMCSA carrier added to census 1974-06-01 per third-party FMCSA mirrors (NewBizBot). Authorized for passenger ops; 1 non-CMV unit. Officer Dan Newby confirmed via LinkedIn and Prevost Coach Facebook post (owner of Crossroad Tours). KS SoS public search portal returned HTTP 403 to scraping; inc_date left unknown.

name: North America Central Sch Bus
fmcsa_address: 3033 W JEFFERSON ST SUITE 220, JOLIET, IL 60435
registry_source: Illinois Secretary of State Business Entity Search (apps.ilsos.gov/businessentitysearch) - LEI/Bloomberg cross-reference (LEI BVPMDUKMLGPLU7BXCK91 confirms 2004-03-23 entity creation date)
notes: FMCSA legal name 'ILLINOIS CENTRAL SCHOOL BUS LLC' DBA 'KANSAS CENTRAL SCHOOL BUS' — this is the umbrella carrier d/b/a 'North America Central School Bus' (NACSB) headquartered in Joliet, IL. Input address (78 N Chicago St, Joliet) is a secondary/legacy Joliet location; FMCSA physical is 3033 W Jefferson St Ste 220, Joliet, IL 60435 (NACSB HQ). 2,619 power units / 3,073 drivers reflect the holding entity for all NACSB operations (46 facilities, ~120 districts). LEI record (Bloomberg LEI database) confirms IL LLC organization date 2004-03-23. Compliance review Jan 2024; ~29.6M miles reported 2025.

name: Amaral Bus Co Inc
carrier_operation: Intrastate Only (Non-HM); Private Passenger (Business) + Authorized For Hire (Passenger)
registry_source: MA Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (corp.sec.state.ma.us) - direct portal lookup blocked; inc_date from BBB / corporate cross-references; family-owned 'since 1976' per amaralcompanies.com
notes: Input address (25 Bedford St, New Bedford, MA) differs from FMCSA physical (1090 State Rd, Westport, MA 02790) — Westport is the primary Amaral Companies HQ adjacent to New Bedford; same carrier (legal name match Amaral Bus Co Inc). Carrier authorized for both private and for-hire passenger. No FMCSA safety rating currently assigned (as of 06/03/2026). Established 1990, incorporated 1991 in MA per business profile sources; Amaral Companies family group dates to 1976. MA Corp Division portal returned ECONNREFUSED; SoC search not directly confirmable, entity_status assumed active given carrier is operating with active USDOT.

name: Dufour Escorted Tours Inc
registry_source: MA Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (corp.sec.state.ma.us) - direct portal lookup blocked (ECONNREFUSED); family-owned, motor coach operations 'since 1970' per Berkshire Eagle archive
notes: Input listed HQ as Franklin Park, IL (9377 Grand Ave) — this APPEARS TO BE A WRONG-ADDRESS RECORD in source list; actual Dufour Escorted Tours Inc is headquartered in Hinsdale, MA (Western Berkshires), per FMCSA, company website (dufourtours.com), and Berkshire Eagle coverage. Confirmed carrier by exact legal name match. Safety rating Satisfactory (rated 04/02/2009 - older). Tour operations were discontinued after 37 years when Wm. and Barbara Dufour retired (per Berkshire Eagle); school bus / charter business continues. inc_date not confirmable from public registry directly.

name: Bowens Bus Svc
registry_source: Maryland SDAT / Business Express (egov.maryland.gov/BusinessExpress) - direct lookup not scrapable; inc date from company website ('officially incorporated as Bowen's Bus Service, Inc. in 2006', founded as sole proprietorship Aug 2001)
notes: Input address (3910 Dudley Ave, Baltimore, MD) differs from FMCSA physical (3625 Ten Oaks Rd, Glenelg, MD 21737, Howard County) — Glenelg is the operational base; Dudley Ave may be older/secondary address. Same carrier confirmed by legal name. Safety Satisfactory (rated 09/28/2010, last reviewed 09/04/2013). Operates ~56 routes for Howard County Public Schools + private school routes. Founded August 2001 by Michael Bowen; incorporated 2006. SDAT portal does not return JSON results to scraper; entity_status active assumption supported by active FMCSA registration and operating business.
